p43_context.framing_note: This analysis uses CSV closing-line implied probability vs model probability. CSV does not include opening/pregame snapshot trajectory, so this is edge vs closing line, not strict CLV (which requires pregame to closing comparison). P26 line-aware CLV diagnostic is separate and unchanged.

required_target_schema.format: CSV, one row per game, closing moneyline odds, final scores

source_evaluations.2024_availability: Available (typically released by Nov following season)
source_evaluations.schema_compatibility: PARTIAL — provides Date, Away, Home, Away Score, Home Score but NO Away ML / Home ML
source_evaluations.effort_estimate: LOW — download and parse, but cannot provide odds columns
source_evaluations.blocker: Does not contain moneyline odds. Cannot resolve the data gap alone.
source_evaluations.priority: LOW — already have scores from existing CSV; no odds value

source_evaluations.access_type: Free web access; structured download requires scraping
source_evaluations.license: Sports Reference LLC ToS restricts automated scraping
source_evaluations.schema_compatibility: PARTIAL — scores and starters but NO moneyline odds
source_evaluations.effort_estimate: MEDIUM — scraping required, ToS restriction risk
source_evaluations.blocker: No moneyline odds data. ToS restricts bulk scraping.
source_evaluations.priority: LOW — does not resolve the odds gap

source_evaluations.data_type: Historical moneyline odds from multiple bookmakers
source_evaluations.schema_compatibility: HIGH — provides home/away ML in numeric form, convertible to target schema
source_evaluations.effort_estimate: MEDIUM — requires API key, paid plan, conversion script
source_evaluations.blocker: Paid subscription required. Governance allows no live API calls, but
source_evaluations.blocker_detail: historical pull can be done as one-time offline download with manual authorization.
source_evaluations.resolution_contribution: FULL — closest match to required schema
source_evaluations.priority: HIGH — only viable path to full resolution
source_evaluations.required_governance_action: Explicit CEO authorization for one-time paid API call

source_evaluations.access_type: Free web access; historical data accessible via URL patterns
source_evaluations.license: Public access; terms restrict commercial use but research use is common
source_evaluations.format: HTML / JavaScript rendered pages; no official API
source_evaluations.schema_compatibility: MEDIUM — moneyline available but requires HTML scraping + parsing
source_evaluations.effort_estimate: HIGH — JavaScript-rendered pages require headless browser; fragile scraping
source_evaluations.blocker: No official API. JavaScript rendering adds complexity. Brittle to site changes.
source_evaluations.priority: MEDIUM — viable but high engineering effort and fragile
source_evaluations.required_governance_action: None (free access) but live browser/scraping counts as automated data pull

source_evaluations.source_name: Kaggle / GitHub Archived MLB Odds Datasets
source_evaluations.access_type: Free; download via Kaggle API or direct link
source_evaluations.license: Varies by dataset (CC0, CC-BY, or unknown)
source_evaluations.2024_availability: UNCERTAIN — community datasets lag by 6-18 months; 2024 season may be available
source_evaluations.schema_compatibility: VARIABLE — must validate column names against target schema
source_evaluations.blocker: Quality and completeness not guaranteed. Provenance may be unclear.
source_evaluations.priority: MEDIUM — worth checking before paying for API
source_evaluations.required_governance_action: None — download without live API call; offline validation required

source_evaluations.source_name: Internal TSL Odds History (2025 Season Only)
source_evaluations.access_type: Internal file (no live call needed for reading)
source_evaluations.2024_availability: NOT AVAILABLE — TSL file covers 2026 spring training only
source_evaluations.priority: NONE — confirmed in P43 as zero-overlap

resolution_paths.name: The Odds API (one-time historical pull)
resolution_paths.governance_requirement: Explicit CEO authorization for one-time paid API call (not live betting)
resolution_paths.rationale: Only source confirmed to provide 2024 MLB moneyline in structured format. One-time historical pull is distinct from live odds API calls. Would unblock P43 cross-year validation and all downstream cross-year analysis.

resolution_paths.name: Kaggle/GitHub community dataset search
resolution_paths.governance_requirement: None — offline download, no live API
resolution_paths.rationale: Free path worth exhausting first. If a validated 2024 MLB moneyline CSV exists on Kaggle, it would resolve the gap at zero cost. Must validate completeness (all 30 teams, full regular season) and provenance.

resolution_paths.name: Sportsbook Review scraping (headless browser)
resolution_paths.governance_requirement: Engineering authorization for automated browser session
resolution_paths.rationale: Viable as fallback if PATH_A and PATH_B fail. High engineering cost and fragility outweigh benefit unless other paths are exhausted. JavaScript rendering adds complexity.

if_gap_resolved.p43_potential_upgrade: P43 could run cross-year bootstrap CI on 2024+2025 combined (~3856 quality rows). If 2024 Tier C shows consistent positive edge, P43 final classification upgrades from P43_BLOCKED_BY_DATA_GAP to P43_CROSS_YEAR_EDGE_CONFIRMED or similar.
if_gap_resolved.risk_if_2024_differs: If 2024 Tier C shows negative or near-zero edge, the combined 2024+2025 CI may narrow or cross zero, weakening the P43 conclusion. This is scientifically correct and should be accepted as a legitimate finding.
downstream_unlock: More robust walk-forward calibration (P45/P46 with 2024 data)
2024 Tier C temporal stability analysis (P44 equivalent)

impact_analysis.recommendation: Execute PATH_B (free Kaggle/GitHub search) immediately. If PATH_B fails within 1 day, request CEO authorization for PATH_A (The Odds API one-time historical pull). PATH_C is fallback only.

recommended_next_actions: PATH_B: Search Kaggle/GitHub for mlb 2024 moneyline odds CSV (free, 0-1 day)
PATH_A: If PATH_B fails, request CEO authorization for The Odds API one-time pull
Do NOT make live API calls without explicit governance authorization
framing_note: P61 is a data-sourcing evaluation report only. No data was downloaded. No live API was called. 2024 closing-line data gap remains unresolved pending resolution path execution. Paper-only. No production proposal. No champion replacement.
limitation: 2024_closing_line_data_unavailable — resolution requires external action. P43 cross-year validation remains blocked until data is sourced.
